---
title: "Anne Scott, Countess of Clonmell"
---

## Anne Scott, Countess of Clonmell

**Dates:** (1818-1872)

**Maiden name:** (de Burgh)

### Description

sister-in-law of James Colborne

### Biography

She was the daughter of Ulysses de Burgh, 2nd Lord Downes of Aghanville.  She married (1838) John Henry Scott, 3rd Earl of Clonmell.  Her sister was married to CMY\'s cousin James Colborne.

### Letters

- Letter from Thursday 1st Oct [1857]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
